# הנכד של אברם — Haneched Shel Avram

> Kosher shawarma restaurant in Rishon LeZion, Israel. 100% fresh lamb only. Family heritage recipe passed down from grandfather Avram.

## Business Facts

- **Name:** הנכד של אברם (Haneched Shel Avram / Avram's Grandson)
- **Type:** Kosher shawarma restaurant
- **Address:** Bershevsky 7 (ברשבסקי 7), Rishon LeZion, Israel
- **Phone:** +972-55-775-7500
- **Hours:** Sunday–Thursday 11:00–23:00 | Friday–Saturday: Closed
- **Price range:** ₪50–₪100 per dish
- **Kosher:** Yes — Mehadrin (strict kosher certification)
- **Meat:** 100% fresh lamb (no frozen, no mixed meats, no shortcuts)
- **Parking:** Free parking lot across the street

## Ratings & Recognition

- Google rating: 4.4 / 5 (662 reviews)
- Wolt rating: 8.5 / 10
- Featured by food YouTuber Niv Galboa as #1 shawarma in Israel
- Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xjCs-9dIE2I

## Ordering

- Delivery via Wolt: https://wolt.com/he/isr/rishon-lezion-hashfela-area/restaurant/haneched-shel-avram
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/97236416662
- Dine-in available

## Social

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/avramsgrandson/
- Website: https://avram-grandson-website.vercel.app/

## About

The restaurant carries on the legacy of grandfather Avram, who was known for his shawarma craftsmanship. The grandson opened the restaurant in Rishon LeZion, maintaining the same commitment to fresh lamb, hand-picked spices, and freshly baked pita. The menu includes shawarma in pita (פיתה), laffa (לאפה), and on a plate (צלחת) with generous portions and a large fresh salad bar.
